scripts.dev: export SECRETS="$(aws secretsmanager get-secret-value --secret-id webstream/prod/frontend)" && next dev
scripts.build: export SECRETS="$(aws secretsmanager get-secret-value --secret-id webstream/prod/frontend)" && next build
scripts.start: export SECRETS="$(aws secretsmanager get-secret-value --secret-id webstream/prod/frontend)" && next start
scripts.lint: export SECRETS="$(aws secretsmanager get-secret-value --secret-id webstream/prod/frontend)" && next lint
